summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy shows no signs of cooling: AI companies alone pulled in over $2 billion this month, with SiFive's $400M Series G and Rhoda AI's $450M Series A leading the charge across Santa Clara, San Jose, and Palo Alto. Most of the region's tech firms are actively hiring, though two are tightening belts—a sign the sector remains robust despite selective pressure on underperformers.
